image_prompt: A dramatic photorealistic aerial view of the Strait of Hormuz at dusk with massive oil tankers lined up waiting to pass through the narrow waterway. Dark storm clouds gather overhead with golden light breaking through, casting dramatic shadows on the dark blue sea. Oil platforms visible in the distance with flames burning. The bottom 40% of the image transitions from the scene into pure solid black (#000000) through a smooth gradient fade. The gradient starts at the 60% line and becomes fully black by the 75% line. The remaining bottom 25% is completely solid black with no elements
